calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2024 Continued To Oct-09-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing (Notices)
Off Calendar Aug-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Cristiane V. Pereira

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:25:35 a.m. and concluding at 9:44:42 a.m. (D505).

Paul Lee, Esq. representing plaintiff Alexander Aceves, trustee of the Elda & Santiago Aceves Revocable Trust.
Plaintiff Alexander Aceves was present, placed under oath and testified.
Defendant Cristiane V. Pereira not appearing.

Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract filed Oct-27-2023.
Proof of substituted service served as to Defendant on Nov-01-2023; effectuated on Nov-10-2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Cristiane V. Pereira on Dec-14-2023.
Motion for prove up hearing filed Mar-28-2024.

Counsel to provide a summary, offer of proof of the prayer in the complaint.
Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the court's review:
Exhibit 1: Lease Agreement
Exhibit 2: Statement of Account
Exhibit 3: proof of service
Counsel examines Plaintiff.
Plaintiff confirms that counsel's statements are true and correct.
The court examines plaintiff.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendant as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant:
Damages $329,661.60
Costs $612.00
Attorney's Fees $0
Interest $0
Total Judgment $330,273.60

Proposed judgment signed and executed this day.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
